tweet.text:
Takeaways from fireside @tuhinone @baseten did w/ @tsgiles at HumanX:
- AI infra market still early
- AI-native companies are post-training to achieve frontier quality-for-less/faster
- inference is supply & talent constrained market
- systems problem
- customer centricity wins
